object_a.label: stove
object_a.description: Stainless steel gas range with oven
object_a.long_form_open_description: Four-burner stainless steel gas stove with visible grates and oven below; front control knobs and oven door with a dish towel hanging from the handle; shows light reflections and typical wear from use.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: centered below the microwave and between two lower cabinets; adjacent to countertop workspace on right

object_b.label: stove
object_b.description: stainless steel gas range with oven and towel on handle
object_b.long_form_open_description: Freestanding stainless steel gas range and oven centered on the back wall. Black burner grates visible on top; oven door has a towel hanging from the handle. Some small items on the countertop nearby.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Beneath the built-in microwave and flanked by lower cabinetry and countertops.
